sentences.text: The bright sun shines warmly in the clear blue sky.
The sky looks wide and beautiful.
Children play happily in the park.
I wear a cap to protect myself from heat.
The warm air feels pleasant on my skin.
Birds fly freely above the trees.
Sunny days make everyone feel cheerful.
Dark clouds gather before the rain begins.
Heavy rain falls from the gray sky.
I open my umbrella to stay dry.
The streets become wet and shiny.
Raindrops tap softly on the window.
Plants grow well after rainfall.
Rainy days feel calm and peaceful.
Thick clouds cover the bright sun.
The sky appears gray and heavy.
The weather feels cool and pleasant.
Birds fly lower than usual.
The wind moves gently across the trees.
Children look up at the cloudy sky.
Cloudy days sometimes bring rain.
Strong winds blow across the open field.
Leaves fly quickly through the air.
Trees bend slightly in the wind.
I hold my hat tightly to keep it safe.
The air feels cool and fresh.
Kites fly higher on windy days.
Windy weather feels exciting and fun.
Dark clouds fill the sky during a storm.
Thunder makes loud booming sounds.
Lightning flashes brightly across the sky.
Heavy rain pours down quickly.
People stay indoors for safety.
The wind blows strongly outside.
The storm passes after some time.
Soft snow falls gently from the sky.
The ground becomes white and cold.
Children wear warm jackets and gloves.
They build a snowman together.
Their breath looks cloudy in the air.
Snow sparkles under the sunlight.
Winter days feel cold but magical.
The sun shines very strongly during summer.
The temperature rises higher each day.
I drink cold water to stay cool.
People wear light clothes in hot weather.
The air feels dry and warm.
Children stay indoors during peak heat.
Hot days require proper care and hydration.
Cold winds blow during the winter season.
I wear a thick sweater and jacket.
My hands feel cold without gloves.
The air feels sharp and chilly.
People drink warm tea to feel better.
Fog covers the road in the morning.
Cold days require warm clothing.
A colorful rainbow appears after the rain stops.
It forms when sunlight passes through raindrops.
The sky becomes bright and clear.
Children point happily at the rainbow.
Seven beautiful colors form the arc.
The rainbow looks magical in the sky.
Everyone feels joyful after the storm.
Spring arrives after the cold winter ends.
Flowers bloom in many bright colors.
The weather feels pleasant and fresh.
Birds sing sweet songs in the trees.
New leaves grow on branches.
Children enjoy playing outdoors.
Spring brings new life and happiness.
